title: Senniella spongiosa
taxonomy: Senniella spongiosa is a species of fungus in the family Dacrymycetaceae. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota and the kingdom Fungi. The classification of Senniella spongiosa is as follows: kingdom - Fungi, phylum - Ascomycota, class - Agaricomycetes, order - Dacrymycetales, family - Dacrymycetaceae, genus - Senniella, species - S. spongiosa. Senniella spongiosa is a saprotrophic species found in nature. It is known to grow on decaying wood.
